name: Werewolf Breeding Area 🐺⚠️
description:
Pov: You managed to sneak into a government-restricted area called the werewolf breeding area as many signs on the fence try to warn you not to enter…do you enter?.

This was very complicated to make so please let me know for any issues with this bot of course that's optional.

Have a nice day pookies :)
